title: Vintage Small Bottles With Corks, Assorted Shapes [12-Pack] Clear Mini Glass Jars With Cork Lids For Crafts, Party Favors & Wedding Decorations- Small Bud Vases/Sand Art Bottles
description:
About this item
CHARMING ASSORTMENT OF 12 MINI GLASS BOTTLES: The Kitchen Lux vintage small glass jars come in 12 beautiful shapes and an elegant mini style that looks stunning in every setting and occasion. Perfect for home and restaurant décor, wedding decorations, DIY Halloween arts and crafts and so many more creative ideas.
CLEAR MINI GLASS JARS WITH CORK LIDS: All of our tiny glass bottles come with cork stoppers to keep the contents of your new bud vases fully protected at all times. Plus, the small corks add an extra touch of elegance and style to your adorable collection of mini jar containers. A practical way to pack any homemade liquors or create mesmerizing sand art bottles without any spills!
GREAT-QUALITY, DURABLE CLEAR GLASS BOTTLES: Made of high-quality clear glass, our mini corked bottles will nicely display all sorts of decorations you want to use with your mini vases. Their durable glass construction also prevents cracks and scratches to keep them looking stunning for years to come!
SUPER VERSATILE FOR ALL CUTE DIYS & BEYOND: These multipurpose apothecary jars with corks would look great as bud vases, flower vases, message jars, party or wedding favor jars with corks, baby shower favors, keepsake glass jars or even as spice bottles for your kitchen. You may also reuse them again and again for fun DIYs you can do at home.
A LOVELY ADDITION TO ANY ROOM & ANY OCCASION: Our assorted sized glass bottles can be used to add a vintage touch to any room around your home, including your bedroom, kitchen, dining room or even your bathroom. They would even look great as Christmas, Halloween & Thanksgiving decorations as well as any other festive occasion.
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
We used them for sand art. Very cute and seem like a quality product.These jars are on the smaller side. I used them to make vanilla for a stocking stuffer for my family members and they loved it. So cute for decorations or other little novelty things.Even though they were a lot smaller than I thought, I loved how each were unique and different from each other. Definitely gave that vintage look I was looking for. I bought potion stickers and some other fillers to create my own potion bottles for the Halloween decor. I will admit, given the size, it was a bit challenging to do. Some of the stickers are a little too big and aren’t sticking like I had hoped but I’m making it work. It’s no big deal. I’m satisfied with my purchase.These little jars will work great with our colored sand projectsI was so happy to find these bottles. I'd had some made by the company Darice (bought out and now mostly discontinued). Each bottle is a different shape, just like shown. They are packaged very carefully and all arrived in good shape with their accompanying stoppers.A few came chipped, so we had to carefully inspect all of them. Other than that, the bottles are true to size and design.JUST PURFECT!These are very pretty and a nice size. Enjoy themMe encantó lo vintage y delicadas que sonAll twelve of the bottles arrived well packed and undamaged. Each bottle is unique and holds a different amount of liquid, but on average they hold between 1/4 to 1/2 cup of liquid. I make my own basil oil, and always need little bottles in which to store the oils. THESE ARE ABSOLUTELY PERFECT!!

There are some negatives, though:
* The corks are for looks only. They do not seal the bottle well. Do NOT turn the corked bottle upside down and expect the liquid not to drip. For sending oils by mail, I will need to find a different stopper.
* Not all the bottles have a flat bottom. Some wobble a little.

In light of their sweetness and their incredibly low price I give this 6 stars.
reviews_1s: I don't know where I am going to find all the little corks I would need to close these bottles once I fill them up. The corks didn't come with them as described.
